articles.title: Bihar sizzles in heatwave, Patna among 10 places with temperature over 40 deg C - Moneycontrol.com
articles.full_text:
Several parts of Bihar remained in the grip of an intense heatwave on Sunday, with temperatures soaring over 40 degrees Celsius in at least 10 places in the state.
Dehri in Rohtas district recorded the highest temperature of 44.8 degrees, while the mercury levels rose to 43.9 degrees in Buxar, 43.7 degrees C in Kaimur and 43.1 degrees C in Aurangabad.
Gaya Ji and Sheikhpura saw temperatures of 42.8 degrees C each, followed by Saran (41.2), Patna (41), Arwal (40.5) and Nalanda (40.4).
The India Meteorological Department (IMD) warned that a severe heatwave will continue in parts of Bihar in the next few days.
"People are advised to avoid heat exposure and dehydration," said a senior official of the Bihar Disaster Management department.
